intro.title: Home Battery Manager
intro.description:
Keep your grid import/export close to 0 W by automatically controlling your battery Set Power entity.

Before you continue, make sure you have:
- A battery Set Power number entity (W)
- Either one net house power sensor (import/export signed), or two separate sensors (import and export, both positive)

Click Submit to continue to setup.

config.title: Home Battery Manager
config.description: Select the entities that represent your house power meter and battery.

data.use_dual_power_meters: Use Separate Import and Export Meters

data_description.use_dual_power_meters: Enable this when you have two sensors: one import meter and one export meter, both reporting positive watts.
data_description.power_meter_entity: Single net power sensor in watts. Positive = importing from grid, negative = exporting to grid.
data_description.power_meter_import_entity: Import meter in watts. Must be a positive value when importing.
data_description.power_meter_export_entity: Export meter in watts. Must be a positive value when exporting.
data_description.battery_set_power_entity: Number entity used to command battery power in watts. Positive = charge, negative = discharge.
data_description.max_charge_power: Upper limit for the charge power setpoint (watts). Used when the entity attributes do not specify a maximum.
data_description.max_discharge_power: Upper limit for the discharge power setpoint (watts, stored as a positive value). Used when the entity attributes do not specify a minimum.
data_description.invert_set_power: Flip the sign of the calculated battery setpoint before it is sent to the battery number entity.
data_description.update_interval_seconds: Minimum number of seconds between battery set power writes.
data_description.overshoot_power: Extra watts added in the correction direction when importing or exporting. Example: with 100 W import and 20 W overshoot, the controller targets 120 W correction.

error.single_meter_required: Select House Power Meter when separate import/export meters are disabled.
error.dual_meters_required: Select both import and export meters when separate import/export meters are enabled.
error.dual_meters_must_differ: Import and export meters must be different entities.

init.title: Home Battery Manager
init.description: Update the entities and power limits used by the controller.
